Description: As a new user, I want to register an account, so that I can access the system
Acceptance Criteria:
1. User can enter name, email, password
2. Email format validated
3. Password strength checked
4. Account created successfully

Description: As a registered user, I want to log in, so that I can access my personalized dashboard
Acceptance Criteria:
1. User can enter email and password
2. Invalid credentials show error message
3. Session created on successful login

Description: As a user, I want to select my role (TA or MO), so that I can access appropriate features
Acceptance Criteria:
1. User can select TA or MO role
2. Role stored in user profile
3. UI adapts to selected role

Description: As a TA applicant, I want to create my profile, so that MO can review my information
Acceptance Criteria:
1. TA can enter personal details (name, student ID, major, year)
2. TA can add contact information
3. Profile saved to system

Description: As a TA applicant, I want to upload my resume/CV, so that MO can review my qualifications
Acceptance Criteria:
1. TA can upload PDF/DOC resume
2. File size limit enforced (max 5MB)
3. Resume stored and linked to profile

Description: As a TA applicant, I want to declare my skills, so that the system can match me with suitable jobs
Acceptance Criteria:
1. TA can select skills from predefined list
2. TA can add custom skills
3. Skills saved to profile

Description: As an MO, I want to create and publish a job posting, so that TAs can view and apply
Acceptance Criteria:
1. MO can enter job title and description
2. MO can specify required skills
3. MO can set deadline
4. Job posted and visible to TAs

Description: As a TA, I want to view available job postings, so that I can find suitable positions
Acceptance Criteria:
1. All active jobs displayed
2. Jobs sorted by deadline
3. Job details visible on click

Description: As a TA, I want to search and filter jobs, so that I can find positions matching my skills
Acceptance Criteria:
1. TA can search by keyword
2. TA can filter by required skills
3. Filter results update in real-time

Description: As a TA, I want to apply for a job, so that I can be considered for the position
Acceptance Criteria:
1. TA can view job details before applying
2. TA can submit application
3. Application linked to TA profile
4. Confirmation shown after submission

Description: As a TA, I want to view my application status, so that I can track my job applications
Acceptance Criteria:
1. TA can see all their applications
2. Status shown (Pending/Accepted/Rejected)
3. Status updates in real-time

Description: As an MO, I want to view all applicants for my job, so that I can evaluate them
Acceptance Criteria:
1. MO can see list of applicants
2. MO can view applicant profiles
3. MO can view resumes

Description: As an MO, I want to select an applicant, so that I can offer them the TA position
Acceptance Criteria:
1. MO can accept or reject applicants
2. TA notified of decision
3. Application status updated

Description: As a user, I want to log out, so that I can securely exit the system
Acceptance Criteria:
1. User can click logout
2. Session terminated
3. Redirected to login page

Description: As a TA, I want to edit my profile, so that I can keep my information up to date
Acceptance Criteria:
1. TA can modify profile details
2. Changes saved immediately
3. Resume can be updated

Description: As a TA, I want to receive AI-powered job recommendations, so that I can find the best matching positions
Acceptance Criteria:
1. System analyzes TA skills and job requirements
2. Match percentage displayed for each job
3. Top 5 recommended jobs shown

Description: As a TA, I want to know which skills I lack for a job, so that I can improve my qualifications
Acceptance Criteria:
1. System identifies missing required skills
2. Suggestions for skill improvement provided
3. Learning resources recommended

Description: As an admin, I want to view workload statistics, so that I can monitor system usage
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Number of active TAs displayed
2. Number of job postings shown
3. Application statistics available
4. Data exportable

Description: As an MO, I want to manage my job postings, so that I can update or remove them
Acceptance Criteria:
1. MO can edit job details
2. MO can close/delete job postings
3. Affected applicants notified

Description: As a user, I want to receive email notifications, so that I stay informed about important updates
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Application status changes trigger emails
2. New job postings notify matching TAs
3. Deadline reminders sent

Description: As a user, I want to access a user manual, so that I can learn how to use the system
Acceptance Criteria:
1. User manual available in system
2. Help sections for each feature
3. Searchable documentation

Description: As a system admin, I want the system to perform optimally, so that users have a smooth experience
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Page load time < 2 seconds
2. Database queries optimized
3. Caching implemented
